name: aspicio
description: Open, inspect, and render DXF/CAD drawings: describe_dxf and render_dxf MCP tools plus skills for reading drawings and embedding the viewer.

interface.longDescription: Describe DXF drawings as structured JSON (layers, units, bounds, entity counts) and render them to PNG images, via the @aspicio/mcp server. Bundled skills teach when to describe vs. render and how to embed the web viewer.
